XCUIElementTypeTextView.value:
> LIVE-MARKER-1776274720 bash: LIVE-MARKER-1776274720: command not found > LIVE-MARKER-1776275922 bash: LIVE-MARKER-1776275922: command not found > mkdir -p ~/Downloads/Documents/Reports/Exports && printf 'hello log
' > ~/Dow nloads/test.log && printf 'bin
' > ~/Downloads/unsupported.bin && python3 - <<' EOF' > from pathlib import Path > p = Path.home()/"Downloads"/"huge.txt" > p.write_text("A" * (600 * 1024), encoding="utf-8") > EOF > printf 'FIXTURES_READY
' FIXTURES_READY > mkdir -p ~/Downloads/Docume
XCUIElementTypeTextView.name: soyeht.liveWatch.list
